productDisplayName: Fila Men Survivor White Sports Shoes
description: Well cushioned and lightweight, the fila Survivor running shoes are designed to offer a comfortable running experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic leather overlays Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Central lacing system for a customised Fit Branding on the side, tongue and collar Padded tongue with mesh lining for comfort Fabric lining with padding for comfort Padded sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Cushioned EVA midsole for abrasion free comfort Outsole TPU outsole with a decoupled heel for impact protection Impact lines to even out the shock Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region Multi directional lugs for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
